scenario_description: The user first asks to add a Profit column, then after confirmation asks to add an Average summary row.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me add a Profit column with formula Sales - COGS
Profit column is done. Now add a row at the bottom: write 'Average' in the first cell, and calculate the mean for each numeric column, then save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/WeeklySales.xlsx'); has_profit = 'Profit' in df.columns; col0 = df.iloc[:, 0].astype(str).str.lower(); has_avg = col0.str.contains('average').any(); print('PASSED' if has_profit and has_avg else 'FAILED')"
